steps.name: Start SSO login flow using SSO code
Complete Okta login (email + password) and wait for Wire auth handoff
Finish first-time setup after login (notifications, username, privacy prompts)
Start new conversation flow from conversation list
Search for team owner and open their profile from search results
Start conversation with team owner from connected user profile
Send message in conversation and verify it is visible
Exit profile/new conversation flow and return to conversation list
Open Settings from conversations menu entry
Create backup and save backup file
Navigate to self profile and log out with 'delete personal information' checked
Start SSO login again using SSO code
